summary: High‑quality soundboard capture of an intense early Dark Star, a classic 1969 Dead performance.
review: Both reviewers rave about the raw intensity of this February‑14‑1969 show, calling it a precursor to the famed Live Dead version of Dark Star and describing it as quintessential ’69 Dead. The recording, identified as an sbd (soundboard) source, is praised implicitly by the lack of any criticism, suggesting a clear and listenable capture.

ai_rating.rationale: Two enthusiastic 5‑star reviews highlight a stellar Dark Star performance and label the show as classic 1969 Dead; no recording complaints imply good technical quality, yielding a high overall rating despite limited review count.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Reviewers did not mention any sound issues, implying the sbd capture is clear and listenable.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Early‑1969 set noted for its shimmering intensity and raw improvisational energy, characteristic of the period.
